voting_stock_percentage.description: Percentage of total voting stock owned

reference_id.description: Reference ID number assigned by the filer

schedule_b_shareholders.description: Schedule B: US shareholders of the foreign corporation

schedule_c_income_statement.description: Schedule C: Income statement in functional currency and USD

schedule_f_balance_sheet.description: Schedule F: Balance sheet in functional currency

assets.description: Assets: beginning and end of year balances

liabilities_and_equity.description: Liabilities and equity: beginning and end of year balances

schedule_e_taxes.description: Schedule E: Taxes paid or accrued (for foreign tax credit)

taxes_paid.description: Taxes paid or accrued by country

schedule_i_shareholder_income.description: Schedule I: Summary of shareholder income from foreign corporation
